Settings

Account & Privacy
Browser notifications

Allow important dashboard alerts in this browser.

Compact dashboard

Use tighter spacing for repeated work.

Reduced motion

Calm animations and moving interface elements.

Research AI Chat
Show chat box

Display the Research AI helper inside the logged-in workspace.

Save research history

Keep recent questions, answers, sources, and voice transcripts locally.

Save Workspace Settings

These settings are saved on this browser for the current logged-in workspace.
